column2: My expenses this month are: Food ₹8,200, Transport ₹3,500, Rent ₹12,000, Utilities ₹2,800, Entertainment ₹1,500, Shopping ₹4,200. My monthly salary is ₹55,000. What percentage of my income did I spend in each category? What is my total spend and savings this month?

Here is my food spend over 3 months: January ₹6,800, February ₹7,200, March ₹9,400. My monthly salary is ₹60,000. How much has my food spend increased? What percentage of my income is food spend in March vs January? Is this a concerning trend?
